events.label: assistant
events.text:
Assessment complete — written to `/app/answer.json`.

**Decision: fail (high risk).** A missing bonding jumper around the water meter violates NEC 250.104(A), which requires metal water piping systems to be bonded and specifically requires a jumper around any meter (or similar device) that could interrupt electrical continuity — meters often have non-conductive or unreliable couplings. Without it, the grounding electrode system connection through the water pipe can't be relied on if the meter is serviced or replaced. This needs a correctly sized bonding jumper (per 250.66) installed and continuity verified before the rough-in can pass inspection.
